title: isoberlinia doka
intro: Isoberlinia doka is a species of plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the African walnut tree. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Isoberlinia doka include its ability to reduce fever, treat various infections, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Isoberlinia doka typically involve its leaves or bark being decocted in water to create a tea or infused in oil to make a topical ointment.
